title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Tapping the left circle button on the earbuds visualization screen toggles zoom in/out unexpectedly in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the connected device name (e.g., the two earbuds) to open the Device Settings screen.
4. On the Device Settings screen, locate the earbud visualization / device management area.
5. Tap the left circle button on the earbud visualization.
6. Observe the screen behavior after tapping.
7. Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: Tapping the left circle button should toggle the earbud visualization view. The first tap should zoom in and display additional text/information. The second tap should zoom out and return to the original screen view.
